How It Works

🔗

1. Connect Wallet

Connect your MetaMask or Rabby wallet to PulseChain

🔍

2. Select Dust Tokens

We scan your wallet for worthless ERC-20 tokens

✅

3. Approve & Sweep

Approve tokens and execute the sweep transaction

💎

4. Receive PRGX + Stake

Get PRGX tokens and stake them for instant rewards

Features

🔥 One-Click Sweep

Convert multiple dust tokens into valuable PRGX in a single transaction. No more manual approvals for each token.

💰 Staking Rewards

Stake your PRGX to earn 6.4 PRGX per second distributed among all stakers. No lock-up period, withdraw anytime.

🏛️ Decentralized Treasury

Governed by a 3-of-5 multisig with all contracts verified on PulseScan. LP tokens locked for 2+ years.
